equivalents_sw: also to woo (only as done by birds); kudona

senses.definition_sw: also to woo (only as done by birds); kudona
senses.definition_dg: Kurya kpwa nyuni dza kuku; kudona.

examples.en: The chicken is pecking seeds on the ground.

senses.definition_en: to dip ugali etc. in soup
senses.definition_dg: Kutumbukiza ugali au chakurya chanjine kpwenye mchuzi; kuchovya.

examples.en: Dip the ugali in the sauce.

senses.definition_dg: Kuingira kpwenye dzitso ra mutu; kutsotsa.

examples.en: An eyelash has got into my eye

sub_entries.definition_sw: kuwa na kitu ndani ya jicho

examples.en: I can't see because I have got something in my eye

senses.definition_en: to fail to keep a secret
senses.definition_dg: Kushindwa kuika siri; kugomba mambo ga siri.

examples.dg: Usimwambire, iye ni mutu wa kutsotsombola.
examples.en: Don't tell him, he is someone who can't keep secrets.
examples.sw: Usimwambie, yeye ni mtu wa kutoa siri.

senses.definition_dg: Kusimama kpwa ncha za vidole vya magulu.

examples.en: Stand on tiptoe to reach up there.

senses.definition_dg: Kusikira hali ya kutaka kukuna ngozi; kuashwa.

examples.dg: Mwiri wangu inatsotsotwa kpwa sababu nkamiza dawa za malaria
examples.en: My skin is itching because I took malaria medicine
examples.sw: Mwili wangu unawasha kwa sababu nimemeza dawa za malaria.

equivalents_en: someone who spoils something before it is ready (especially fruits)

senses.definition_en: someone who spoils something before it is ready (especially fruits)
senses.definition_dg: Mutu anayeharibu chitu kabla ya kukomaa, hasa matunda.

examples.dg: Mwanache yuya n'tsovya; kamendze kuona maembe ganavyalwa
examples.en: That child always spoils (the fruits); she doesn't like to see the mangoes ripen
examples.sw: Mtoto yule ni mtundu; hawezi kusubiri maembe yaive.

senses.definition_dg: Kukosa adabu, kukala na tabia mbii.

examples.en: A rude child must be rebuked.
examples.sw: Mtoto asiye na adabu lazima akemeshwe.

equivalents_sw: one of a number of small birds with slender curved

senses.definition_sw: one of a number of small birds with slender curved
senses.definition_dg: Aina ya nyuni adide wenye mdomo mure wa kupinda, anayerya utomvu wa maua.

examples.dg: Tsozi ni nyuni muridze wa rangi.
examples.en: The sunbird is beautiful in colour.
examples.sw: Tsozi ni ndege mzuri wa rangi.

senses.definition_en: to squeeze out coconut juice, to strain (liquid)
senses.definition_dg: Kukamula madzi ga nazi kpwa kutia na kubana; kuchuja.

examples.en: Squeeze out the coconut juice.

senses.definition_en: tasteless, bland (e.g. food without salt, tea without sugar)
senses.definition_dg: Chakurya chisichokala na ladha, hasa bila munyu au sukari.

examples.dg: Mchuzi huno ni tsufu, ika munyu.
examples.en: This sauce is bland, add salt.
examples.sw: Mchuzi huu ni dufu, weka chumvi.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala bila kuphumzika, kutangatanga.

examples.en: The child is restless, let him sit down.

senses.definition_en: to trip up, to fall unintentionally
senses.definition_dg: Kuguta gulu na kuanguka bila kutarajia.

examples.en: He tripped and fell on the ground.

senses.definition_dg: Kuricha chitu chiuke, kuachira.

examples.en: Let that animal go, let it leave.

senses.definition_dg: Chinyama cha tsakani chenye nguvu na ukali, chenye madoadoa.

examples.dg: Tsui ni chinyama cha hatari sana.
examples.en: The leopard is a very dangerous animal.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala swafi, kukala bila uchafu.

examples.en: Those clothes are very clean.

equivalents_en: Tsunusi alavyaye moyo kutsuka. God is the one who gives without reservation

senses.definition_en: Tsunusi alavyaye moyo kutsuka. God is the one who gives without reservation
senses.definition_dg: Kukala na Mulungu ambaye anapha bila kubana.

examples.en: God who gives us a clean heart.

senses.definition_dg: Kuisha, kumala.

examples.en: In July the mangoes have finished (the season is over)

senses.definition_dg: Kukala na hasira kpwa mutu; kumchukia.

examples.en: Don't be angry with me, I didn't wrong you.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala na hasira kali sana; kuchukia.

examples.en: He was very angry when he heard that news.

senses.definition_en: to offend, to make someone angry
senses.definition_dg: Kuhenda mutu akasirike au asikire vibaya; kuchukiza.

examples.en: Don't do offensive things.

senses.definition_dg: Kutsukura chitu na kuchiika phanjine; kuchukua.

examples.en: Take this luggage and go with it.

senses.definition_dg: Kutsukura chitu; kubeba.

examples.en: Carry this box.

senses.definition_en: to consider s.o. (to be), to treat s.o. (as if)
senses.definition_dg: Kuona mutu dza mutu fulani; kuchukulia.

examples.en: I consider you to be my own son

equivalents_en: wash some part of the body

senses.definition_en: to wash some part of the body
senses.definition_dg: Kuosha seemu ya mwiri.

examples.en: Wash your hands before eating.

senses.definition_en: to wash part of one's body
senses.definition_dg: Kuosha seemu ya mwiri wako.

examples.en: Wash your face.

senses.definition_dg: Kuswafisha chombo chipya.

examples.dg: Tsula sufuria ipya kabla ya kuihumira.
examples.en: Clean the new pot before using it.
examples.sw: Osha sufuria mpya kabla ya kuitumia.

sub_entries.definition_sw: kuosha mtoto mchanga baada ya kuzaliwa

senses.definition_dg: Kirima kidide chirichodzengwa ni mchwa; chichuguu.

examples.en: There is a big ant hill there in the bush.

senses.definition_en: to gather, to work for money
senses.definition_dg: Kukusanya, kuhenda kazi ya kuphaha pesa.

examples.en: He who gathers (works hard) in the sun will get to eat in the shade

senses.definition_dg: Vitu vinji virikotundikpwa phamwenga; biwi, chungu.

examples.en: The pile of sand has grown too big.

senses.definition_dg: Kunwa chiasi kidide tu.

examples.en: Sip your tea, and relax.

senses.definition_dg: Njira ya kupata na kuhumira mali; uchumi.

examples.en: Our country's economy is progressing.

senses.definition_en: to gnaw, to eat the flesh around a bone
senses.definition_dg: Kurya nyama kula dzulu ya fupha; kuguna.

examples.en: Gnaw that bone well.

senses.definition_en: to speak ill of someone, to slander
senses.definition_dg: Kugomba mambo mabii kuhusu mutu; kusengenya.

examples.en: Don't slander someone behind their back.

senses.definition_dg: Kuingiza seemu ya nguwo ndani ya suruali au shuka; kusheta.

examples.dg: Tsundika shati rako ndani ya suruali.
examples.en: Tuck your shirt into your trousers.
examples.sw: Sheta shati yako ndani ya suruali.

senses.definition_en: to uncork, to remove a tight lid
senses.definition_dg: Kuvula chifuniko chirichokala chikafungwa kpwa nguvu; kutoa kizibo.

examples.en: Uncork that bottle.

equivalents_en: look after or bring animals (e.g. goats) together

senses.definition_en: to look after or bring animals (e.g. goats) together
senses.definition_dg: Kutundza nyama dza mbuzi na kuzikusanya phamwenga; kuchunga.

examples.en: The boy is herding goats in the bush.

equivalents_en: sieve or sift flour in a basket

senses.definition_en: to sieve or sift flour in a basket
senses.definition_dg: Kupepeta unga au muhama kpwenye chikapu; kusifta.

examples.en: Sift this flour well.

senses.definition_dg: Chinyama kidide cha tsakani chenye masikiro mare na migulu ya nyuma mire.

examples.en: The hare is a very clever animal

senses.definition_en: to peep, to peek out of or into something (with some movement
senses.definition_dg: Kulola kula ndani ya chitu au kupitira tundu; kuchungulia.

examples.en: The child is peeping from the window.

examples.dg: Proverb: Dunia ni mlomo wa diya, tautsungurirwa
examples.en: The earth is (like) a dog's mouth, you cannot look inside it

senses.definition_dg: Simsimi adide sana a rangi nyiru.

examples.en: Tiny black ants bite a lot.

senses.definition_en: to fall in love, to be in love with someone
senses.definition_dg: Kupendza mutu sana; kuangukira mutu.

examples.dg: Tsunusi (-) a 'Swahili' spirit found in the sea, believed to cause people to drown (their bodies are only recovered some time later)
examples.en: If a person struggling with this spirit is cut by someone else the spirit will leave
examples.sw: Mvulana huyo alimpenda sana msichana huyo.

sub_entries.definition_sw: kitunusi; pepo ya kiswahili kutoka bahari ifanyayo baharia atose majini

senses.definition_dg: Kupita, kuvuka; kutsupa.

examples.en: Three days have passed.

senses.definition_en: part of a banana plant, a red cone which grows from the stem
senses.definition_dg: Seemu ya mgomba ya rangi ya kundu inayotsembuka kula kpwenye chihandzo.

examples.en: The banana flower cone looks beautiful.

sub_entries.definition_sw: sehemu nyekundu chini ya mkungu wa ndizi

senses.definition_dg: Kutupa chitu kpwa mkono; kutsupha.

examples.dg: Watsupha dziwe mpaka ng'ambo ya phiri ya muho
examples.en: He threw the stone until the other side of the river
examples.sw: Alitupa jiwe hadi ng'ambo ya pili ya mto.

senses.definition_dg: Kuvundzika kpwa tupa ya uzazi wakati wa kuzala.

examples.en: The woman broke her waters and was taken to the hospital.
examples.sw: Mwanamke alivunja tupa na akapelekwa hospitalini.

senses.definition_en: to disappoint, to let someone down, to fail someone
senses.definition_dg: Kusikitisha mutu, kutomtimizira ahadi.

examples.dg: Hwabisha dzulu ya ukurima na uwe piya uchikubali kukala ukurima tautsupha
examples.en: We talked about farming and you also agreed that farming does not fail
examples.sw: Tulijivunia kilimo na wewe pia ulikubali kuwa kilimo hakitatuangusha.

equivalents_en: mikono to wave to each other

senses.definition_en: mikono to wave to each other
senses.definition_dg: Kupungiana mikono; kulagana.

examples.en: We waved to each other in farewell.

equivalents_en: kupiga to carry someone sitting on one’s shoulders

senses.definition_en: , kupiga to carry someone sitting on one’s shoulders
senses.definition_dg: Kutsukura mutu akale dzulu ya mabega; kupiga kibega.

examples.en: The father carried his child on his shoulders.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhenda chitu chikale swafi; kusafisha.

examples.en: Clean the house well.

senses.definition_dg: Kuangusha matunda au majani kula muhini; kutsutsa.

examples.en: Pluck the mangoes from the tree.

senses.definition_dg: Kunyendeka kpwa haraka; kuhenda kpwa upesi.

examples.en: Hurry up and go be ready.

equivalents_en: white ants in the flying stage when they first come out of the ground

senses.definition_en: white ants in the flying stage when they first come out of the ground
senses.definition_dg: Mchwa a nyerupe arururukao wakati wa kutuluka kula ardhini.

examples.en: Flying termites come out after rain.

senses.definition_dg: Dzuwa kuphiya tsini na kuisha kuonekana; kuchwa.

examples.en: The sun set and it became night.

sub_entries.definition_en: farewell phrase used in the late afternoon

senses.definition_dg: Mchwa mkpwulu sana; kumbikumbi.

examples.en: Tswaa are big termites.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala kondze hadi dzuwa richwe.

examples.en: Don't stay out until sunset, return home early.
examples.sw: Usikae nje hadi jua kuchwa, rudi mapema nyumbani.
